features: White Glo Smokers Formula Whitening Toothpaste Pack of 2
Pack contents: White Glo Smokers Formula 150g White Glo X-Action toothbrush White Glo Dental Flosser and toothpicks
description: Directions For adult use, apply a pea-sized amount of toothpaste to a soft-bristle toothbrush. Brush teeth thoroughly for at least two minutes, covering all surfaces, and spit out excess. Do not swallow. Use as part of a regular oral hygiene routine, typically twice a day, for best results, including cavity prevention, plaque removal, and teeth whitening. Safety Warning For adult use only, do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children.
